# SHINES Headlight Restoration

> Professional headlight restoration in Belgium with mail-in service across Europe.

- Website: https://shines.be
- Contact: info@shines.be
- Services: garage visit, mobile (Belgium), mail-in (Europe)
- Pricing from €149 for both headlights (pair)
- Process: https://shines.be/headlight-restoration-process
- Belgium cities: https://shines.be/locations
- Europe countries: https://shines.be/europe
- FAQ: https://shines.be/#faq
- Book: https://shines.be/book

Languages: English, Dutch, French, German (auto-detected from browser; override at /choose-country-region).
